Name resolution: middleware= references declared names; unknown names
error with the declared set, unreferenced named middleware warns.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware name=auth
func RequireAuth(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:middleware name=idle
func Idle(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:group /admin middleware=missing
type Admin struct{}

//fabrik:http GET /users
func (a *Admin) Users(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /login middleware=nosuch
func Login(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /account middleware=auth
func Account(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:middleware name=duponly
func DupOnly(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http GET /twice
func TwiceA(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /twice middleware=duponly,ghost
func TwiceB(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:middleware name=wrapped
func Wrapped(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:handle /files
func FilesA(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /files middleware=wrapped,wraith
func FilesB(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
warning: web/web.go:8:1: middleware "idle" is never referenced
  help: list it in a middleware= chain, or drop name= to make it global
error: web/web.go:11:39: unknown middleware "missing"
  help: declared names: auth, duponly, idle, wrapped
error: web/web.go:17:37: unknown middleware "nosuch"
  help: declared names: auth, duponly, idle, wrapped
error: web/web.go:29:1: duplicate route GET /twice
  help: first declared at $WORK/web/web.go:26:1
error: web/web.go:29:45: unknown middleware "ghost"
  help: declared names: auth, duponly, idle, wrapped
error: web/web.go:38:1: duplicate route /files
  help: first declared at $WORK/web/web.go:35:1
error: web/web.go:38:48: unknown middleware "wraith"
  help: declared names: auth, duponly, idle, wrapped
